---
name: Command Request
about: Suggest a new human-readable command
title: "[command] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What should the command be called?

<!-- Plain English name, e.g. "show-docker-logs" -->

## What should it do?

<!-- One sentence -->

## What's the ugly PowerShell/bash it replaces?

```powershell
# Paste the cryptic command here
```

## Should this be in core or a pack?

- [ ] Core (works on any Windows machine)
- [ ] Pack (requires a specific tool like Docker, Node, etc.)
